free_text: 10B levels from elastic scattering of protons by 9Be
The target were metallic Be, 1-5 keV thick to 1 MeV
protons, evaporated on thin C and Ni backings.
An absolute cross-section measurement was performed
gamma-rays from the 9Be(p,gamma)B10* reaction was used
to obtain the target thickness for the absolute-yield
and the values of the stopping cross section of protons
The estimated total uncertainty in the beam energy
